sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74281" key="o)/cuqric" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄξυ-θριξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τρῐχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh.<sense id="n74281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">light-haired</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bristly-haired,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.198</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
